PHP Version 8.2.18

System Linux hardened 6.1.0 #1 SMP x86_64
Configure Command './configure' '--enable-fpm' '--with-fpm-user=www-data' '--with-fpm-group=www-data'
Server API FPM/FastCGI

Core

DirectiveLocal ValueMaster Value
disable_functionsexec,system,shell_exec,passthru,proc_open,popen,curl_exec,curl_multi_exec,parse_ini_file,show_sourceexec,system,shell_exec,passthru,proc_open,popen,curl_exec,curl_multi_exec,parse_ini_file,show_source
open_basedir/var/www/html:/tmp/var/www/html:/tmp
allow_url_fopenOffOff
allow_url_includeOffOff
file_uploadsOffOff
include_path.:/usr/share/php.:/usr/share/php
upload_max_filesize2M2M
upload_tmp_dir/var/php-uploads/var/php-uploads
user_ini.filenameno valueno value
session.save_path/var/lib/php/sessions/var/lib/php/sessions
